texts.desc:
You can only use the 1st and 2nd effect of this card’s name each once per turn.
(1) Target 1 monster you control and 1 face-up card your opponent controls; destroy your monster, and if you do, negate that opponent’s cards’ effects until the end of this turn.
(2) If this Set card is sent to the GY: You can target 1 face-up card your opponent controls; negate its effects.
texts.name: Cursed Paper Retribution
